description: Controlled actor classes for audit and MVP events. This taxonomy classifies actors; it is not a direct enum restriction for the current actor field.

baseline_compatibility.rule: The current schema field actor remains an open string because valid baseline examples use concrete actor identifiers such as polaris-core and policy-engine.

values.definition: Human or client-side requester that initiates or contributes to a controlled event.
Aurora-controlled system process that emits or triggers an event.
MVP module acting as the event source or control participant.
Human reviewer involved through Human-in-the-Loop, double review or escalation.
